review_title: Pipedrive on a brazilian tech startup - Review
description: Pipedrive has been a solid experience for me. It’s definitely made managing my sales process smoother and more organized, i have used pipedrive on a tech startup, in my opinion pipedrive has been the best choice for te integration of the team activities
author: Lucas P.
pros: pipedrive have a clean and intuitive design that makes it easy to navigate Have some great and easy intregations like email, calendars, and marketing software is great for Sales Tracking
cons: is pricey for small teams The reporting options could be more robust
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great I love how easy it is to use. I would highly recommend it to someone who’s beginning a new CRM.
author: Michael B.
pros: I like that there’s multiple ways to document details for a client. I like the note section I like being able to have a source ID to connect my account to a wrap easily.
cons: I would like better reporting availability options so I can see different levels of how the pipeline is being done, especially in the won my section

review_title: Pipedrive customer service is so bad, that it ruins the product
description: not good, I have spent a long time using it, and for example I had accidentally set up an account that i did not use, and it was obivous, and they would not refund me even though they could see that I had an account I was using under the same email.
author: keith M.
pros: pipedrive has a lot of features and is easy to use
cons: pipedrive customer service is utter garbage, I have been locked out of my primary account for days. They will not call you and if you cant log in then you cannot chat. and their AI support is idiotic at best.

description: I find it very user-friendly. The documentation is thorough and helpful. The few times I have a question I can chat with support and they are quick to help me.
author: Mirjam M.
pros: The search function at the top is great. I use it all the time to find contacts, deals and organizations. I like how the data on leads, deals, persons and organizations all are can be customized and linked together.
cons: I use Pipedrive as a marketer. The basics are covered (what we need for now) but I miss good reports for newsletters and the ability for tracking clicks from newsletters to our website.

description: Overall, I'm using Pipedrive to track deals for about $650K in revenue. Being able to move deals down the pipeline is helpful.
author: Ryan S.
pros: Clearly and visually see my deal pipeline
cons: It might be more than I need right now in a CRM

review_title: Fulfills my needs, 90% of everything is there and Works Great
description: Very easy to get going with the must have features.
author: Calum M.
pros: Does everything I need without having to do massive amounts of configurations. Great UI/UX, Fast and intuitive. Data can be in easily managed in bulk and exported and imported back in. Automation Tools and Integrations with Make.com, Zapier are relatively easy to setup Smart Documents, great inclusion considering the alternatives out there are priced so high. Email Integration is pretty solid, if you team are able to be transparent adds a lot of clarity to deals/organisations.
cons: Missing some customisation features which could help with business rules you want your users to follow or understand. Not all data is easily accessed via API or Excel. Price, Product models to simplistic for my particular use cases.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: CRM Built for Long Term Use
description: A definitely leap in use cases from the previous CRM I was using. Being able to integrate with my Google Calendar for tasks/events, and entering in a number of custom fields that I can filter by is very useful.
author: Josh A.
pros: There are many ways to customize and complete tasks that can be set for each user. I can grow with the service, upgrading to higher tiers for more tools.
cons: All the customization can make it difficult to decide how to best implement the services across the company. The base tier restricts the use of certain tools that would be extremely beneficial to a small start up, such as automated cadence emails.

review_title: Great product and happy to continue to use it
description: Im happy becuase its a smooth experience ideal for us (small sized sales team) It’s simple and powerful for managing leads, automating tasks, and improving follow-ups.
author: Jose Z.
pros: really like that it offers an easy interface with customizable pipelines, fast onboarding, good reporting tools, mobile accessibility, and seamless integration with email and calendar.
cons: Reporting lacks depth, and costs increase with essential add-ons. tools are minimal, which may require additional costs to implement

review_title: Simplicity. Implementation on your own without a need for an implementation agency.
description: I was very happy with using Pipedrive, it didn't require a 'consulting agency' to implement it, I was able to implement in a 100+ software development company.
author: Matt K.
pros: The simplicity. The UX and the UI. It's super easy to set up, even for a non-technical person.
cons: Reporting seemed to be pretty limited in what you are able to do. Some of the metrics you can only view in "this month" mode, and not everything you can see in a timeline to track it over time.

description: Overall satisfied when considering it is a low cost product.
author: Kevin B.
pros: It covers the basics of what we need in a CRM.
cons: It has limitations when you have multiple product lines or locaitons

description: Pipedrive creates a efficient, intuitive, and smart hub to manage clients
author: Trae H.
pros: Quick and efficient sorting for current and prospect clients
cons: Duplication clients are not automatically marked, which in the fitness industry would save loads of time

review_title: Solid CRM tool well-integrated with the apps ecosystem
description: First time using Pipedrive, after years of experience using Salesforce and Hubspot, and I really enjoy the user-centered experience. The tool has allowed us to build powerful sales automation (Activecampaign, Zapier, Calendly, Clickfunnels, etc) to empower our team to focus on closing more deals.
author: Jonathan P.
pros: Very intuitive CRM, with solid integrations with other apps through Zapier.
cons: The licence is not cheap and it was difficult to migrate data seamlessly from one pipedrive account to another.

description: I liked using Pipedrive as our CRM software. It is very user friendly.
author: Mary B.
pros: I liked having customer information all in one place and being able to schedule tasks in advance.
cons: We used the Beta version, so sometimes there would be kinks to work out, but other than that, I can't think of any cons.

review_title: ENDLESS Possibilities and Knowledge at Your Fingertips
description: Amazing! The amount of capabilities that Pipedrive has is absolutely astounding - you can have every detail about a lead, deal, organization, client, and more in there, and the possibilities are endless. No joke, you could pull up a lead and know their eye color, favorite food, where you met them, and even input a note detailing an important detail in your conversation with them, that you can drop into your next conversation. You log in activities like phone calls, emails, texts, and more, and it syncs easily with your inbox so that is all automated and literally everything is logged for reference. In theory, this program can fix employee turnover training times - new employees just have to open up a lead, and every and any detail they need to know is there for reference, from the last employee that handled that account.
author: Sitav E.
pros: I love the amount of details you can input into this program. We need to have lots of different notes and details and variables for our business, like leads versus deals, and then for each contact we need to know where we got that client, why, what organization they are a part of, the organization's address, phone number, and the individuals addresses/phone, plus we are able to add activities, notes, whether the lead is cold, warm, hot, etc. The organization and details are endless, and it's incredibly helpful - this is truly how you educate an entire organization on every detail needed to know of a lead or client.
cons: It is admittedly a bit hard to learn - it's very user-friendly, but because of how many capabilities and opportunities that Pipedrive has, it takes a bit to learn all the ins and outs.

description: Pipedrive lets our customers do there quote online with ease.
author: michell B.
pros: easy way to get online quotes. Customers can enter all there info online.
cons: Sometimes customers do not enter all the information. They miss some important info.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The experience is really bland. I would consider this an oversided note taking platform. Way to many free options that are better.
author: Brandon M.
pros: It is a resource for basic information gathering.
cons: It is not designed for complex data entry. Outside of text, there is no way to creatre formulas to help make the date compute beyond typed text.

description: Pipedrive is a simple and efficient CRM. I appreciated its ease of use.
author: Ana O.
pros: I like the visual clarity of Pipedrive. Deal tracking is simple, and the mobile app is very convenient.
cons: I wish there were more options for customizing reports. Email integration could be improved.

description: Overall, my experience with Pipedrive has been positive. The visual pipeline makes it super easy to track where each deal stands, and I also appreciate the real-time reporting. On the downside, the mobile app isn’t as powerful as the desktop version.
author: Daniela L.
pros: How intuitive and visual it is. The interface is super user-friendly, and you can see your entire sales pipeline at a glance. It’s like having a chessboard where each piece represents a sales opportunity, and you can easily move them from one stage to another. Plus, the task automation is a lifesaver; it saves you tons of time on repetitive tasks. And the real-time reports are awesome for knowing exactly how your sales are doing without having to do any complicated calculations. Overall, it makes managing sales a lot simpler and even a bit fun.
cons: It can get a bit pricey. While the interface is generally cool, it can sometimes feel a bit overwhelming with all the options and settings available. It takes a bit of time to get everything set up just the way you want it. Also, the mobile app isn’t as robust as the desktop version, so managing things on the app is awfull.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Pipedrive is simple to use and doesn't require extensive reading to grasp how it works. They offer some wonderful tutorials to aid with anything that may arise. It's an excellent tool for anyone looking for something easy to use and inexpensive. The tools allow our small team to keep track of emails, leads, and lead stages all from a single dashboard. Pipedrive is designed specifically for sales professionals. The management reporting tools are there and improving every quarter, but Pipedrive stands out for its ease of use for salespeople.
cons: One disadvantage to using Pipedrive is that you have to pay extra to use some custom fields in the reports, and the fee can be rather high, especially if you want to unlock all of the features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It enables transparent sales pipeline view board.It also have appealing user interface.
author: Divine I.
pros: I love how Pipedrive helps to create sales funnel from scratch.
cons: I don’t have anything that i don’t like about this product.

description: Overall, having readily available information, for the sales team allows quick access to deals in seconds, making the process more efficient and effective.
author: Chisimdi O.
pros: Easy accessibility to information, seamless integrations, and helpful reminders.
cons: one major drawback for me is the limited customization

description: I wasn't very pleased with it. The lagging
author: Kenneta D.
pros: It was ok, it was easy to operate and understand
cons: Lagged sometimes if Internet was having issues
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like how it's so easy to set up. It offers a variety of analysis and reporting tools to help you gain insight into the sales process.
cons: It can be quite expensive and slow to update. It will be even better if the onboarding feature improves.

review_title: Great, easy to use CRM - but expensive
author: David L.
pros: Helps a lot to keep track of clients and to recall the last conversations / emails etc you had with them. One of the most essential tools for a business.
cons: It’s confusing that you can’t put in contact information for companies. The only way to do it is to connect people with the company, but sometimes you just want to put in general phone number / email address. Also, it’s, compared to competitors, expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very happy and impressed with the value of this software. It has been instrument in providing structure to our sales process and sales team
author: James W.
pros: Ease of use for me and my team. Keeps us on track and engaged. It has become the software solution to that drives our sale meetings.
cons: I am unsure how this software would scale to an enterprise solution (I have a salesforce background)
